rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DONALD GLICKMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: First Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday June 4, 2018, line 1. PETITIONER DONALD GLICKMAN, DYANNE FRIEDLANDER First Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL BOSCHETTI VS. JESSICA L. DUTTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday June 4, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT JESSICA DUTTON Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED without prejudice. Defendant failed properly serve and file motion per CCP § 1005. Motion was filed 5 court days before hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL BOSCHETTI VS. JESSICA L. DUTTON ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday June 4, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT JESSICA DUTTON Amended Notice Of Motion And Amended Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Off Calendar. Defendant failed properly serve and file motion per CCP § 1005. = (501/CFH)
